title: Supply Chain Manager - Navkar Corporation - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Navkar Corporation - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Supply Chain Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
